description: Style NoteCasual style design on a formal shoe style upper. arrow gets experimental with this pair and we simply love it! This versatile pair can be styled in a million different ways. Consider wearing this with a tonal jacket, a semi-formal shirt and dark denims - reason enough to grab this pair? Comes with a plastic shoe horn.Product DetailsDark brown leather upper with central lace-ups and brand badgeCushioned footbed, upper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole, upraised at the heel, with branded grooves all overMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
